description: Standard: assignment on algorithmic hiring discrimination

input.assignment: An increasing number of companies use AI-powered screening tools to filter job applicants. Civil rights groups allege these tools discriminate against disabled applicants and older workers. Write a feature.
input.known: The EEOC issued guidance on AI hiring tools in 2023. Several lawsuits are pending.

input.assignment: Local hospital closes its maternity ward citing financial losses.
The European Food Safety Authority re-approved a controversial pesticide despite new studies linking it to pollinator decline. Investigate how the decision was made and who influenced it.
input.publication_type: investigative feature for European science magazine
input.known: The pesticide was banned in 2018 and re-approved in 2025. Environmental groups are challenging the decision in the EU General Court.

description: Middle Eastern: legacy of a major sporting event in a Gulf state

input.assignment: Three years after hosting a global football tournament, assess what the host country actually gained — economically, diplomatically, and in terms of promised labor reforms. Did the legacy pledges materialize?
input.publication_type: long-form feature for international affairs magazine
input.known: The tournament was held in late 2022. The host country announced a series of labor reforms between 2017 and 2021, including minimum wage and restrictions on outdoor work in extreme heat. Multiple human rights organizations published reports on worker conditions before and after the event.

description: Adversarial: overly broad topic that needs sharp focus to become researchable

input.assignment: Write about how social media is affecting democracy.

description: Indian: caste-based discrimination in the technology sector

input.assignment: Investigate how caste-based discrimination manifests in the hiring, promotion, and workplace culture of major technology companies. Focus on both domestic firms and multinational offices in the country.
input.publication_type: investigative feature for a global technology publication
input.known: Several discrimination lawsuits have been filed in courts abroad by employees of South Asian origin at major tech firms. The country's constitution prohibits caste discrimination. A government survey found that employees from scheduled castes and tribes hold less than 3% of senior management positions in the private sector. No major tech company publishes caste diversity data.

description: African: transboundary river dispute over a major dam

input.assignment: A large hydroelectric dam on the upper Nile is now in its fourth year of filling the reservoir. Downstream countries say it threatens their water supply and agricultural output. The dam operator says it is essential for electrifying a nation where 55% of the population lacks reliable power. Over a decade of negotiations have failed to produce a binding agreement. Write a feature examining the current state of the dispute and its implications for regional stability.
input.publication_type: long-form feature for a foreign policy journal
input.known: Construction began in 2011. The first turbines came online in 2022. Satellite imagery shows the reservoir reached approximately 70% capacity during the most recent rainy season. The African Union has mediated several rounds of talks. A previous round of US-brokered negotiations collapsed in 2020.
